title: 10 Essential Oils for Baldness in Men
description: Sesamum indicum essential oils, also known as sesamin oil, have been found to be beneficial for hair loss and baldness due to its unique properties. The oil is rich in sesamin and sesamolin, which are known for their antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. These constituents help to reduce oxidative stress and inflammation in the scalp, which can contribute to hair loss.
